turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Ordering Coffee at a Café

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hi, good morning. Can I get a flat white, please?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Good morning! Absolutely, a flat white it is. Would you like that in a small, medium, or large size?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “How much is about a medium and a large one?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: For a medium flat white, it’s $4.50, and for a large, it’s $5.50. Which size would you prefer?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Do you have any promotion or discount on this?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, we do have a special offer today! If you get a medium flat white, you can add a pastry for just $2 extra. Would you like to take advantage of that deal?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Do you have any proposal with the last one?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Currently, the special promotion is only for the medium size. But if you'd like a large flat white, I can offer you a free extra shot of coffee for just $0.50. How does that sound?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, so I will get a medium one and the promotion you gave me.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect choice! So, that’s a medium flat white and a pastry for $6.50 in total. Would you like to pay by card or cash?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “OpenPICCard, do you have membership on something else?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: We do have a membership program! You can earn points with every purchase and get discounts on future orders. Would you like to sign up today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, it is.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great! I’ll sign you up right away. Could I have your name and email address, please?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “My name is Anh. My email is 1234567.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thank you, An!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “The... Okay. The...”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're welcome, An! I’ve signed you up for our membership. Your total is $6.50. You can pay with your card here. Is there anything else I can help with?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can I ask about what means, what are you using?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! We use a premium Arabica blend for our coffee, sourced from sustainable farms. It’s roasted locally here in Sydney for the freshest flavor. Is there anything else you’d like to know?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I'm sorry, I'm not really good about the information of the beans or about the coffee. Can you give me more details of the information of the beans?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No problem at all! Our beans are Arabica, which means they have a smooth and rich flavor. They come from farms that focus on quality and sustainability. We roast them right here in Sydney so that you get the freshest taste possible. Does that help?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, sure. So...”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great! I’m glad that helps. Here’s your coffee and pastry. Enjoy, and have a wonderful day!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Thank you so much!”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're very welcome! Enjoy your coffee!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I'm done with my coffee. Do you have any more recommendations?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! If

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I want to try something like fresh and make me like...”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! If you’re looking for something fresh, you might enjoy our iced lattes or a refreshing iced tea. We also have some delicious smoothies if you prefer a fruitier option. Would any of those interest you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Pattern please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great! If you like something fresh and fruity, our mango or mixed berry smoothie is a fantastic choice. They’re both refreshing and delicious. Would you like to give one a try?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Do you help me with watermelon or mango or strawberries?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, we have a delicious watermelon smoothie and a mango smoothie. Unfortunately, we don’t have a strawberry smoothie, but the watermelon and mango ones are both amazing. Which one would you like to try?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can you combine a watermelon and a mango?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That sounds delicious! We can definitely make a mixed watermelon and mango smoothie for you. It’s a refreshing combo. Would you like that in a small or medium size?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Medium-sized please, but do you have any toast or like something sweet for me to eat?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! For our smoothies, you can add a scoop of protein powder or a boost of chia seeds for an extra charge. Would you like to add any of those to your smoothie?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “No, I'm sorry, I mean that I want something to eat and I want something that's sweet.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it! If you’re looking for something sweet, our baked goods like muffins or cookies are a great choice. We have chocolate chip cookies, blueberry muffins, and more. Would you like to try one?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, Blueberry 1.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great choice! I’ll add a blueberry muffin to your order. So that’s a mixed watermelon and mango smoothie and a blueberry muffin. Your total is $9.50. How would you like to pay?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Please, can you give me like, don't put any more sugar in the smoothie, please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Certainly! I’ll give you $10 back. Here’s your order: a mixed watermelon and mango smoothie, a blueberry muffin, and $10 in change. Enjoy your day!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “No, what about a $10 change? I just said that I don't want any sugar in my smoothie.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I’m sorry for the mix-up! I’ll make sure your smoothie has no added sugar. And your total is $9.50. How would you like to pay?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “All are to pay by card.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect! You can go ahead and tap your card here. Thank you so much!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can I ask that you use the fresh fruit or you use frozen fruit?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: We use fresh fruits whenever possible for our smoothies. The watermelon and mango we use are fresh and carefully selected to ensure the best taste. If you have any more questions or need anything else, feel free to ask!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Where do you get the fruit from?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thank you for understanding! If you need anything else or have more questions, just let me know. Enjoy your day!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I'm sorry I asked about where do you get the food from.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No problem! We source our fruits from local farms around Sydney. This way, we support local farmers and ensure the freshest ingredients for our customers. If you have any more questions, feel free to ask!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Oh, where is local from? Because I want to, like, make a company, like, make a coffee shop, like, yeah, I just want to learn about another coffee shop, and also I want to open a coffee shop.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s exciting! Starting a coffee shop sounds like a great venture. If you have any questions or need tips on sourcing ingredients or anything else, feel free to ask. Good luck with your coffee shop plans!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, so I asked about where the local farm is.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Local farms around Sydney can be found in areas like the Hawkesbury region, which is known for its fresh produce. There are also farmers' markets in Sydney where local farmers sell their goods directly. Supporting local farms is a great way to ensure high-quality ingredients for your coffee shop.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “as the number of the farmers raised.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I'm sorry, I can't provide specific phone numbers. However, you can find local farms and their contact information through online directories or by visiting local farmers' markets. They often have websites or contact details available to connect with them directly.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I see. Thank you so much. Thank you. Thank you for the food.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re welcome! If you have any more questions, feel free to ask. Good luck with your coffee shop!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Thank you so much. Have a good day.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You too! Have a great day!
